analysis.object: T571: Quicksand as Depth Trap depth analysis

shear_thickening.description: Non-Newtonian fluid: shear thickening under stress; fighting increases depth
shear_thickening.reason: Struggling in quicksand triggers EML-inf: more force -> more resistance -> deeper trap

depth_trap.description: Each struggle increases EML depth of interaction; positive depth feedback loop
depth_trap.reason: Depth trap theorem: quicksand is a system where fighting EML-inf makes it worse

survival_depth_reduction.description: Survival strategy: go still, spread weight; depth reduction to EML-0
survival_depth_reduction.reason: Escape = depth reduction: minimize movement (EML-0 static) to break depth trap
